---
title: "About Me"
author: Abdullah Al Mahmud
date: today
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    theme: sky
    reveal_plugins: ["chalkboard", "zoom", "menu"]
    self_contained: false
    lib_dir: libs
    css: css/styles.css
    includes:
      in_header: css/header.html
---

# Abdullah Al Mahmud

## Profile

- Lecturer in statistics
- PCC (2019) ➤ SCC (2022) ➤ MGCC (2025)
- DU Stat
- <a href="https://www.rokomari.com/book/author/47631/abdullah-adil-mahmood" target="_blank">Wrote 6 Science Books</a>
- Websites: <a href="https://www.thinkermahmud.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">www.thinkermahmud.com</a> <a href="https://www.bishwo.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">www.bishwo.com</a>,
<a href="https://www.statmania.info/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Statmania</a>
- <i class="fa-solid fa-house"></i> Lakshmipur

## Hobbies

- Watching Sky
- Programming
- Reading
